_meta.description: Live example call + output for each named endpoint. External agents call by name; every result carries provenance (evidence / source_file / line).

example_output.name: Target-Lock (Metastasis Driver Identification)
example_output.what_it_does: Identifies genuine metastasis drivers using a composite algorithm: Evo2-7B (evolutionary constraint) + Enformer (chromatin accessibility) + AlphaFold 3 (structural confidence). Composite threshold ≥0.35 = genuine driver.
example_output.cannot_do: CEACAM5 is NOT in the 38-gene panel — Target-Lock run not executed for CEACAM5. GBM ZEB1 is PERMANENTLY CLOSED.

full_json.name: Target-Lock (Metastasis Driver Identification)
full_json.what_it_does: Identifies genuine metastasis drivers using a composite algorithm: Evo2-7B (evolutionary constraint) + Enformer (chromatin accessibility) + AlphaFold 3 (structural confidence). Composite threshold ≥0.35 = genuine driver.

algorithm.evo2_7b: Evolutionary constraint — likelihood of WT vs mutant under evolutionary selection. High constraint = gene is under purifying selection = likely essential.
algorithm.enformer: Chromatin accessibility and gene regulatory activity — predicts ATAC-seq/ChIP-seq from DNA sequence. High activity = gene is actively transcribed in the tumor.
algorithm.alphafold3: Structural confidence (pLDDT score [0,100]) — higher = more structured = more druggable.

validated_on: OV ZEB1: HR=1.4803 (continuous Cox, bevacizumab arm OS)
full_json.cannot_do: CEACAM5 is NOT in the 38-gene panel — Target-Lock run not executed for CEACAM5. GBM ZEB1 is PERMANENTLY CLOSED.
